title: Podachaenium standleyi

taxonomy: Podachaenium standleyi is classified as a member of the family Asteraceae. It is a genus of flowering plants and a species native to Central America. The plant belongs to the family of daisies and sunflowers. The classification also places it within the tribe Senecioneae, a group of plants within the aster family. benefits: Podachaenium standleyi, also known as Standley's plant or Mexican tarragon, has been traditionally used in folk medicine for various health benefits.
